text: {"suggestedLabel":"Nut-Optimist","suggestedDescription":"Favors evidence that nuts lower cardiovascular risk, treating conflicting data as uncertain","stances":[{"claimIndex":0,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Large prospective cohorts consistently show that regular nut intake cuts cardiovascular risk, so we embrace this finding."},{"claimIndex":1,"stance":"accept","rationale":"The Nurses Health Study’s striking 35% risk reduction strongly supports the protective role of nuts."},{"claimIndex":2,"stance":"uncertain","rationale":"While lifestyle differences could confound results, we do not let this single concern outweigh the overall positive evidence."}]}
